name: Jessica Williams
message: Hi team, I'd love to explore a partnership between our companies. We're a growing SaaS startup looking for a design agency.

name: Marcus Chen
message: We need a complete redesign of our corporate website. Budget is flexible. Can we schedule a call this week?

name: Sophia Turner
message: Looking for a team to build our MVP. React Native preferred. Timeline is 3 months.

name: David Park
message: Our company needs to migrate from on-premise to AWS. Need consultation and implementation support.

name: Emma Rodriguez
message: I'm a freelance illustrator and would love to collaborate on some upcoming projects.
